description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Rate Limiter refers to the overall mechanism or system that limits the volume of token movements over time, implemented via the

contracts. The Rate Limiter manages multiple rate limits and enforces constraints on controller operations to prevent rapid asset drainage and mitigate risks from compromised relayers or other attacks. This ensures that the maximum amount of tokens processed within a specific time period stays within safe bounds. The `RateLimits` contracts and their addresses for each chain can be found in the Allocation System Primitive for a Prime, under ALM Contracts.
